title: EL SUPERVIVIENTE
description: A man is doing his best to survive in a dangerous, apocalyptic world

sentences.translation: the survivor

sentences.text: En ese futuro no tan lejano
sentences.translation: In that not so distant future...

sentences.text: Estoy demasiado cansado y tengo frío. Se están acercando. No llegaré muy lejos. Necesito descansar hasta la mañana.
sentences.translation: I am too tired and cold. They are getting closer. I will not get very far. I need to rest until the morning.

sentences.text: Veo una casa grande, en la colina. Creo que está lo bastante cerca.
sentences.translation: I see a big house on the hill. I think it is close enough.
The door is open...

sentences.text: No puedo ver. Está muy oscuro...
sentences.translation: I can't see. It's very dark.
Is there anyone here?
Hello...?
Hey! Who's there?

sentences.text: No me hagas daño...! por favor...!
sentences.translation: Don't hurt me, please...
Wait... Stay there!
Who are you? What's your name?

sentences.text: Me llamo Diego... Vivo aquí... En esta casa...
sentences.translation: My name is Diego. I live here. In this house.
Do you live here? Are you alone? Where are your parents?

sentences.text: Mi madre está muerta, y mi padre está con ellos ahora.
sentences.translation: My mother is dead, and my father is with them now.
Who are you? What's your name? Where are you from?

sentences.text: Me llamo Javier. Vengo de Madrid. Mi familia... bueno... ellos también se han ido.
sentences.translation: My name is Javier. I come from Madrid. My family... well... they are gone too.

sentences.text: ¿No tienes familia? Quizás podamos ser familia...?
sentences.translation: No Family? Maybe we can be family...?
Do you have anything to eat?

sentences.text: No... pero podemos salir a buscar algo.
sentences.translation: I don't, but we can go out to get something.
Get some food? Where?
Wait here...
Where are you going?
What is this for...?
To get food. Come.
You get food... with this...?
Yes! Come on. I'll show you!

sentences.text: El sol ya salió. Tenemos que esperar hasta la noche...
sentences.translation: The sun is up. We need to wait until night.

sentences.text: No... No tenemos que esperar. Hago esto todo el tiempo. No conocen este lugar. Estaremos a salvo.
sentences.translation: No... We don't have to wait. I do this all the time. They don't know about this place. We'll be safe.
They are clever. They could be waiting for us.

sentences.text: Está bien. ¡Lo he hecho muchas veces!
sentences.translation: It is alright. I've done it many times!
Alright. Let's go.

sentences.text: Quédate detrás de mí. Sé adónde ir... Muy, muy en silencio.
sentences.translation: Stay behind me. I know where to go. Very, very quietly.
Let's go!
TO BE CONTINUED...
